de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule

Class JoinRuleUtils.LocVarReplBranchUniqueMap

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.AbstractMap<K,V>
      • java.util.HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.JoinRuleUtils.LocVarReplBranchUniqueMap
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable, Map<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>
    Enclosing class:
    JoinRuleUtils

    private static class JoinRuleUtils.LocVarReplBranchUniqueMap
extends HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>
    Map for renaming variables to their branch-unique names. Putting things into this map has absolutely no effect; the get method just relies on the LocationVariable#getBranchUniqueName() method of the respective location variable. Therefore, this map is also a singleton object.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer
